metadata.description: Multi-perspective code review toolkit — a 6-stage team review pipeline plus curated vendor skills.

plugins.name: claude-helpers
plugins.description: 6-stage team code review pipeline — agent debate, Codex/GPT-5.4 cross-model review, CC-native review, BMAD adversarial review, consolidation, and Devil's Advocate challenge.

plugins.name: bmad-review
plugins.description: BMAD adversarial code review — Blind Hunter, Edge Case Hunter, Acceptance Auditor with structured triage.

plugins.name: devils-advocate
plugins.description: Challenges AI-generated plans, code, designs, and decisions using pre-mortem analysis, inversion thinking, and Socratic questioning.
